description: Style NoteIf you want to look fashionable and stylish at this time of the year, sepia has just what you need. This dressy, girly and summery long top is a must-have in your wardrobe. Pair this with fitting jeans and ballet flats for a sweet, femine vibe.Product DetailsOrange colour long top, has ruffled cap sleeves and a boat neck , with fabric details at the neck and curved hem line and a braided beltMaterial and Care100% RayonRinse seperatelyGentle handwash in mild detergentDo not bleachDo not scrub on embroidery or printDry on reverse side under the sunIron at low temperatureSize and FitThe model (height 5'8'' chest 33'') is wearing a size M
